jobDistinction.legacyPausedAuditJob: Broad website issue discovery plus small automatic fixes/upgrades; currently paused.
jobDistinction.currentRemediationJob: Backlog-driven remediation, optimization, and upgrade loop based on .hermes/remediation-backlog.md.

nonOverlapPolicy: If the previous remediation run is still active, skip the current tick instead of starting another fix run.

freshAuditPolicy.action: Run comprehensive audit, update remediation-backlog.md with newly discovered or reprioritized issues, then continue remediation.
freshAuditPolicy.completionAuditDetail: When the current checklist is completed, run a broad detailed audit like the 2026-05-30 manual review: backend/API, frontend/UI, permissions, production behavior, performance/data scale, tests, deployment, logs, navigation, accessibility, and real user journeys; update remediation-backlog.md before continuing.

lastHealthyBaseline.tests: Storage quota aggregate regression passed; neighboring storage tests passed 28/28; full Vitest passed 176 files / 721 tests
lastHealthyBaseline.production: vcontrolhub-next and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws restarted active; /api/status healthy; /files returned 307; /api/files/list and /api/storage/local returned 401; recent service logs clean

lastRun.target: P2 reduce storage grant quota large in-memory reads
lastRun.summary: Changed storage grant quota enforcement from loading matching FileEntry sizes with findMany into a database-side aggregate _sum(size), preserving per-grant quota behavior while reducing API worker memory/CPU for large storage trees.
validation: production baseline before work: vcontrolhub-next.service and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service active; /api/status healthy; recent logs clean; local HEAD matched origin/main
neighboring storage tests passed 28/28: access-control, local route, sftp-ops route, sftp-sync
npm run lint passed with existing react-hooks/set-state-in-effect warnings
production services vcontrolhub-next.service and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service restarted and active
recent production logs checked; no new error/warn entries
lastRun.deployment: Restarted vcontrolhub-next.service and vcontrolhub-ssh-ws.service successfully; smoke test passed. Functional commit 25950a9 created; bookkeeping state update will be committed separately.
lastRun.nextTarget: Run the required comprehensive fresh audit because the success counter has exceeded the configured threshold. Remaining backlog items include P1 storage sync taskification and P3 management-facing URL/direct-access hardening.

runPolicy.batchSize: coherent deployable batch; may be larger for high-value architecture/performance/availability/user-experience improvements if fully verified
